hero.title: Fundraising & Events
hero.subtitle: We host events that raise funds to support our students, with multiple ways to contribute — whether you join us in person or give on your own time.
events.heading: Events We've Hosted
events.lead: Throughout the year the PTA organizes fun community events that raise money for school programs.
events[0].label: 🎲 Trivia Night at Healy's

gallery.heading: Event Photos
shop.heading: Shop & Support
shop.lead: Support the PTA while shopping — at no extra cost to you.
shop.amazon.title: Amazon
shop.amazon.body: Click through to Amazon via our link before checking out. The PTA receives a percentage of your purchase at no extra expense to you.
shop.mabels.title: Mabel's Labels
shop.mabels.body: Order personalized labels and the PTA earns a portion of your sale. Use our fundraiser link when you shop.
shop.shoprite.title: ShopRite for My School
shop.shoprite.body: Register your ShopRite card with our school so your grocery purchases generate funds for PS5.
shop.pediped.title: Pediped
shop.pediped.body: Shop for kids' shoes through Pediped and support the PTA. Registration required — contact us for the code.
cta.heading: Want to Help Plan an Event?
cta.body: We'd love your help organizing and running events. Email us to get involved.
